source.title: The Great Awakening of Human Consciousness

boundary: This artifact summarizes a geometry-mapping audit of paraphrased source findings. It does not validate the source claims.
interpretation: The hybrid structure preserved the intended evidence boundary: speculative claims remained outward and tense, while practice, analytical, and design constraints stayed closer to the center.
next_test: Apply the same template to a contrasting conventional neuroscience or meditation source and compare map deformation.
